memberdef.argsstring: (ServerCredentials const &InCredentialsRef, ServerSettings const &InSettingsRef, FHttpRetrySchedulerBase &InHttpRef, TSharedPtr< FServerApiClient, ESPMode::ThreadSafe > InServerApiClient=nullptr)
memberdef.name: ServerSessionBrowser

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &GameMode, FString const &GameMapName, FString const &GameVersion, uint32 BotCount, uint32 MaxPlayer, TSharedPtr< FJsonObject > OtherSettings, THandler< FAccelByteModelsSessionBrowserData > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: CreateGameSession

briefdescription.para: Create public P2P game session to Session Browser.

parameterdescription.para: game mode of the game.
map of the game.
version of the played game.
number of bot.
maximum number of player can join the session.
other setting in json format
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsSessionBrowserData.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &GameMode, FString const &GameMapName, FString const &GameVersion, uint32 BotCount, uint32 MaxPlayer, uint32 MaxSpectator, FString const &Password, TSharedPtr< FJsonObject > OtherSettings, THandler< FAccelByteModelsSessionBrowserData > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: CreateGameSession

briefdescription.para: Create private P2P game session to Session Browser.

parameterdescription.para: game mode of the game.
map of the game.
version of the played game.
number of bot.
maximum number of player can join the session.
password of the game session
maximum of spectator
other setting in json format
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsSessionBrowserData.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.name: CreateGameSession

briefdescription.para: Create custom game session to Session Browser specified by the type.

parameterdescription.para: type of the session: p2p or dedicated
game mode of the game.
map of the game.
version of the played game.
number of bot.
maximum number of player can join the session.
password of the game session
maximum of spectator
other setting in json format
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsSessionBrowserData.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

briefdescription.para: Create custom game session to Session Browser specified by the type.

parameterdescription.para: type of the session: p2p or dedicated
game mode of the game.
map of the game.
version of the played game.
number of bot.
maximum number of player can join the session.
password of the game session

This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsSessionBrowserData.
This will be called when the operation failed.

memberdef.name: CreateGameSession

briefdescription.para: Create custom game session to Session Browser specified by the type.

parameterdescription.para: create session parameters.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsSessionBrowserData.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &SessionId, uint32 MaxPlayer, uint32 CurrentPlayerCount, THandler< FAccelByteModelsSessionBrowserData > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: UpdateGameSession

briefdescription.para: Update the session to Session Browser. Current player count can not be updated from update session. CurrentPlayerCount will be updated automatically when register / unregister players.

parameterdescription.para: id of the session want to update.
current number of player in the session.
maximum number of player can join the session.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsSessionBrowserData.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &SessionId, uint32 MaxPlayer, THandler< FAccelByteModelsSessionBrowserData > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: UpdateGameSession

briefdescription.para: Update the session to Session Browser.

parameterdescription.para: id of the session want to update.
maximum number of player can join the session.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsSessionBrowserData.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &SessionId, FAccelByteModelsSessionBrowserUpdateRequest const &UpdateSessionRequest, THandler< FAccelByteModelsSessionBrowserData > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: UpdateGameSession

briefdescription.para: Update the session to Session Browser.

parameterdescription.para: id of the session want to update.
update session parameters.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsSessionBrowserData.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &SessionId, THandler< FAccelByteModelsSessionBrowserData > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: RemoveGameSession

briefdescription.para: Remove the session to Session Browser.

parameterdescription.para: id of the session want to update.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsSessionBrowserData.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &SessionTypeString, FString const &GameMode, THandler< FAccelByteModelsSessionBrowserGetResult > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, uint32 Offset=0, uint32 Limit=10)
memberdef.name: GetGameSessions

parameterdescription.para: the session type, either "dedicated", opr "p2p".
the game mode of the session to query.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsSessionBrowserGetResult.
This will be called when the operation failed.
offset of the query
number of data to return

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

parameterdescription.para: the session type, either "dedicated", opr "p2p".
the game mode of the session to query.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsSessionBrowserGetResult.
This will be called when the operation failed.
offset of the query
number of data to return

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.name: GetGameSessions

parameterdescription.para: the session type, either "dedicated", opr "p2p".
the game mode of the session to query.
value will be true, false or empty
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsSessionBrowserGetResult.
This will be called when the operation failed.
offset of the query
number of data to return

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

value will be true, false or empty

This will be called when the operation failed.

number of data to return

memberdef.name: RegisterPlayer

parameterdescription.para: id of the session
player to add
indicates as spectator
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsSessionBrowserAddPlayerResponse.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &SessionId, FString const &PlayerToRemove, THandler< FAccelByteModelsSessionBrowserAddPlayerResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: UnregisterPlayer

parameterdescription.para: id of the session
player to remove from game session
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsSessionBrowserAddPlayerResponse.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

parameterdescription.para: id of the user
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsSessionBrowserRecentPlayerGetResult.
This will be called when the operation failed.
offset of the query
number of data to return

password to join if required
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsSessionBrowserData.
